title: NDTV Nava Punjab Summit Highlights: "AAP A National Party": Bhagwant Mann On 'Arvind Kejriwal Super CM' Charges
description: NDTV Nava Punjab Summit Live: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Singh Mann, Chief Secretary KAP Sinha and DGP Gaurav Yadav are among the key figures speaking at the NDTV Nava Punjab Summit being held in Chandigarh today.
